summary: The Prague payload validator divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in existing Prague sidecar and EIP-7702 validation error returns; no validation behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 240: M	crates/payload/validator/src/prague.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to existing `PayloadError::PrePragueBlockRequests` and `PayloadError::PrePragueBlockWithEip7702Transactions` returns.
No Prague activation check, sidecar presence validation, or EIP-7702 transaction validation behavior changed.
